## Routing Guidance

1. `subagent-routing-playbook.md` for medium/large tasks
2. For small-scope tasks, implement directly without subagent handoff

## Instruction Drift Guard

1. If referenced instruction files change, re-read them before continuing.
2. If plan/implementation changes as a result, record the delta in your response.
